name: MAVE Neural Network Training
description: Train supervised machine learning models on Deep Mutational Scanning (DMS) and MAVE datasets. Predict protein variant effects and combinatorial mutation outcomes. Run Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) simulations to characterize fitness landscapes.
capabilities: Train supervised machine learning models on Deep Mutational Scanning (DMS) and MAVE datasets
Predict protein variant effects and combinatorial mutation outcomes
Run Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) simulations to characterize fitness landscapes

training_data.description: CSV file with protein variant sequences and corresponding fitness/activity measurements from DMS or MAVE experiments

wild_type_sequence.description: Wild type protein sequence as the reference

num_mcmc_samples.description: Number of MCMC samples for fitness landscape characterization
